title: eMuleBB 0.7.3-rc.1 quick release campaign
description: Repeatable RC-blocking campaign for package readiness. Uses bounded quick live/stress profiles plus targeted controller and aMuTorrent proof; full overnight soak is tracked by emulebb-0.7.3-overnight.

evidence.description: Operator records the validate command result in the release checklist.
Covered directly and through certification; pytest output is recorded by the operator when run standalone.
Python harness validates the release coverage ownership manifest against campaign scenarios.
Protocol surface diff, protocol goldens, and protocol live-diff are command-level evidence.
Community-core coverage command result remains authoritative when no summary path exists.
Native parity, coverage, and live-diff command result is recorded by the operator.

scenarios.title: Protocol tag and file-format golden coverage

evidence.description: Native parity suite owns Kad/eD2K tag serialization and release file-format golden tests.

scenarios.title: eD2K links and collection boundary coverage

evidence.description: Native collection, direct download, and protocol parity tests own link and collection parser boundaries.

scenarios.title: Server and IP filter native boundary coverage

evidence.description: Native server input, server socket, server.met persistence, and IP filter update seams cover current nonblocking release ownership.

scenarios.title: Windows VM local eD2K transfer proof
scenarios.command: python -m emule_workspace test windows-vm --matrix win10,win11 --profile local-ed2k-transfer --release-version 0.7.3-rc.1 --skip-build

scenarios.title: Windows VM REST smoke/stress companion
scenarios.command: python -m emule_workspace test windows-vm --matrix win10,win11 --profile rest-smoke-stress --release-version 0.7.3-rc.1 --skip-build

scenarios.title: Installer-backed controller surface reusable VM swarm
scenarios.command: python -m emule_workspace test campaign-scenario --scenario emulebb.flow.controller.installer-swarm.v1 --mode vm --release-version 0.7.3-rc.1 --skip-build --swarm-tier 1 --local-swarm-mode plan --dry-run
scenarios.localCommand: python -m emule_workspace test campaign-scenario --scenario emulebb.flow.controller.installer-swarm.v1 --mode local --swarm-tier 1 --local-swarm-mode execute
scenarios.vmCommand: python -m emule_workspace test campaign-scenario --scenario emulebb.flow.controller.installer-swarm.v1 --mode vm --release-version 0.7.3-rc.1 --skip-build --swarm-tier 1 --local-swarm-mode plan --dry-run

evidence.description: Native friend/source, direct-download, category, and comment/Kad-note seams own nonblocking dialog input coverage. Scheduler, IRC, archive preview, legacy HTML templates, and proxy support are frozen and excluded from release evidence.
